attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,WMRT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WMRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WMRT.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_CAL_CD         
,WMRT.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT     
,WMRT.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT    
,WMRT.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
,WMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
,WMRT.GL_DT                         
,WMRT.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD           
,WMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD                 
,WMRT.MERAKI_TRX_QTY                
,WMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD          
,WMRT.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY            
,WMRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT             
,WMRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD                
,WMRT.SS_CD                         
,WMRT.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT               
,WMRT.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT         
,WMRT.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT                
,WMRT.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT          
,WMRT.DV_FISCAL_MTH_YR_NUM_INT      
,WMRT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
    
,WMRT.REV_RECOGNIZED_FLG            
,WMRT.SEQUENCE_ID                   
,WMRT.OFFR_ATTR_PCT                 
,WMRT.BUSINESS_APPLICATION_NAME     
,WMRT.CLAIM_START_DT      
,WMRT.CLAIM_END_DT    
,WMRT.TRXL_LINE_PCT   
,WMRT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WMRT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WMRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WMRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER  
,WMRT.RETRO_FLG /*ADDED FOR DEC2020 MERKAI CHANGE*/
,WMRT.RECLAIM_VER_NUM_INT             /*ADDED FOR DEC2020 MERKAI CHANGE*/
FROM $$WORKDB.W_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX WMRT 
WHERE WMRT.DML_TYPE = 'I' 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT WMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT 
WHERE NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY =  WMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY )
